description: Testing the availability and display of fixed navigation in specified screens.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Fixed Navigation is available in some screens
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Displays correctly as designed:
+ Position: <Position>
+ Label of item: <item name>

description: Testing the absence of fixed navigation in specific screens where it should not appear.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Fixed Navigation is NOT available in some specific screens
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Fixed Navigation is NOT available in some specific screens.
[base on requirement]

description: Testing fixed navigation position behavior during various scroll and zoom actions.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the position of Fixed Navigation when scroll down/up

Using:
 - The arrows on scroll bar
 - The arrows on the keyboard 
 - The Page up/Page Down button on the keyboard
 - Zoom in/Zoom out
expected_result:
- Fixed Navigation still displayed on the screen.
- Fixed Navigation does not move to another position.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify appropriate screen displays when clicking on menu item
expected_result:
+ Correct screen is opened when clicking on the menu item
+ The scrceen is directed in the current browser tab or a new tab
